prevalence.trend: increasing prevalence with aging and improved survival

incidence.source: Cancer registry and hematology cohort data

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; chronic disease with treatment-related morbidity

vulnerablePopulations: patients with family history of CLL
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Persistent lymphocytosis with immunophenotyping by flow cytometry; staging by Rai/Binet

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; access to targeted therapies varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Flow cytometry available in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Watchful waiting for early-stage; chemoimmunotherapy or targeted agents (BTK inhibitors) for progression
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to newer targeted therapies in SUS and geographic disparities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized hematology centers in major cities
